series_metadata.series_description: Record consists of a State of Ohio identification card application (BMV 2002)and any supporting documentation in accordance with section 4507.50 thru 4507.52 of the ORC.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: paper records that are not microfilmed ; Microform: ID card applications issued prior implementation of Print On Demand (POD) shall be retained seven (7) years. As POD process progresses all microfilm will eventually be destroyed. ; Electronic: At time application is made obtain a drivers license, using print on demand, information, including signatures, shall be captured and stored electronically. Electronic files shall be retained a period of eight (8) years, and
retention_rules.disposition_method: Paper: Shred ; Microform: Shred ; Electronic: Delete
